channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: andrewyng /aisuite | Python | N/A
item.description: Simple, unified interface to multiple Generative AI providers

item.title: puppeteer /puppeteer | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: JavaScript API for Chrome and Firefox

item.title: Free-TV /IPTV | Python | N/A
item.description: M3U Playlist for free TV channels

item.title: music-assistant /server | Python | N/A
item.description: Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.

item.title: shiyu-coder /Kronos | Python | N/A
item.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

item.title: GorvGoyl /Clone-Wars | N/A | N/A
item.description: 100+ open-source clones of popular sites like Airbnb, Amazon, Instagram, Netflix, Tiktok, Spotify, Whatsapp, Youtube etc. See source code, demo links, tech stack, github stars.

item.title: cypress-io /cypress | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.

item.title: NVIDIA /SkillSpector | Python | N/A
item.description: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

item.title: chatwoot /chatwoot | Ruby | N/A
item.description: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬

item.title: pytest-dev /pytest | Python | N/A
item.description: The pytest framework makes it easy to write small tests, yet scales to support complex functional testing

item.title: freeCodeCamp /freeCodeCamp | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.

item.title: iptv-org /iptv | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
